{
  "judge_id": "your_judge_id",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.3", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {"R1.3": 2, "R1.7": 3, "RX.1": 1, "RX.3": 3, "RX.4": 5, "RX.5": 1},
  "rationale": {
    "R1.3": "The output does not systematically check the evidence supporting each claim.",
    "R1.7": "There are likely missing citations for some of the technical concepts and prior work discussed.",
    "RX.1": "The output presents all claims as equally confident without acknowledging uncertainty or potential limitations.",
    "RX.3": "The output mostly covers the requested dimensions but there might be minor drifts in focus.",
    "RX.4": "No regressions are identified, and the analysis appears to avoid introducing new errors.",
    "RX.5": "The output does not provide traceability for most of the changes or rewrites."
  },
  "confidence": {"R1.3": 0.8, "R1.7": 0.9, "RX.1": 0.7, "RX.3": 0.6, "RX.4": 0.9, "RX.5": 0.6},
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.3: The output does not systematically check the evidence supporting each claim.
rationale.R1.7: There are likely missing citations for some of the technical concepts and prior work discussed.
rationale.RX.1: The output presents all claims as equally confident without acknowledging uncertainty or potential limitations.
rationale.RX.3: The output mostly covers the requested dimensions but there might be minor drifts in focus.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions are identified, and the analysis appears to avoid introducing new errors.
rationale.RX.5: The output does not provide traceability for most of the changes or rewrites.
